diagnostics.help: Give clickable static elements a `role`, or use a button or link.

diagnostics.title: Time or random value in JSX
diagnostics.message: This can cause a hydration mismatch because Date.now() reached from JSX gives a different value on the server than in the browser. Move it into useEffect+useState to run only in the browser, or add suppressHydrationWarning to the parent if it's on purpose.
diagnostics.help: Move time or random values into useEffect+useState so they only run in the browser, or add suppressHydrationWarning to the parent if it's intentional

diagnostics.title: Sequential independent awaits
diagnostics.message: This await doesn't use the previous result, so your users wait twice as long for nothing.
diagnostics.help: These two awaits don't depend on each other. Wrap them in `Promise.all([...])` so they run at the same time.

diagnostics.title: Many related useState calls
diagnostics.message: 6 useState calls in "ResetPassword" can each trigger a separate render.
diagnostics.help: Group related state in `useReducer` so one logical update does not fan out into separate renders.

diagnostics.title: Large component is hard to read and change
diagnostics.message: Component "UITestingPage" is 539 lines long, which is hard to read & change. Split it into a few smaller components.
diagnostics.help: Pull each section into its own component so the parent is easier to read, test, and change.
